relations.notes: Both target AI-revenue disclosure regime — focal is voluntary chip-vendor 10-Q footnote ahead of SEC; sibling is the SEC concept release itself.

Both expect Q3 2026 disclosure milestone driven by Mag 7 / $700B capex tape; focal on chip side, sibling on hyperscaler per-token-margin floor.
